_readme: One entry per person. companies: list of board names from config.json, or ['all']. filters: optional per-user override — any key omitted falls back to the global filters in config.json; set a key to '' to disable that filter for this user. DELIVERY TIERS: jobs at watchlist companies (regex vs company name) that are intern/new-grad roles PING loudly (🎯 embed to ping_webhook, with discord_mention if set — put '<@your-user-id>' there to guarantee a push); every other match lands @silent (no notification) in a browsable feed, split internships vs full-time, routed to feeds.intern / feeds.full_time. Any webhook left unset falls back to discord_webhook, so it all works in one channel too. Webhooks: use 'env:SECRET_NAME' and store the URL as a GitHub Actions secret (Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions); a raw URL also works but is visible to anyone with repo access. ops: true → alert when a board fails 10+ polls. digest: true → daily 📊 summary at digest_hour_utc. telegram_chat_id: create a bot with @BotFather, message it once, read chat id from api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates. mute: true disables a user without deleting them.
